title: ADD SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block of every ADD SKILL.md file. Validated in CI by .github/workflows/schema-check.yml. Rejects scope creep in allowed-tools and malformed descriptions.

disable-model-invocation.description: Claude Code convention: if true, the skill is not callable automatically by the model — must be invoked explicitly by the user.

description.description: One-line purpose. MUST start with [ADD vX.Y.Z] prefix for version visibility in autocomplete.

argument-hint.description: Human-readable description of expected arguments. ADD extension, not in Anthropic spec.

allowed-tools.description: Claude Code tool names this skill may invoke. MUST be restricted to what the skill actually uses — reviewers check for scope creep. Adding Bash/Write/Edit to a previously-read-only skill requires CODEOWNER approval (see SECURITY.md).

references.description: Optional list of reference files (relative to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/) this skill must load on demand. Makes the load contract machine-checkable — audits can verify the skill actually reads what it declares.
